name: J-Stream
description: Tokyo-listed CDN & video streaming vendor — live/VOD APIs, CMAF packaging and Japan-regional edge POPs.

seo.title: J-Stream — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: J-Stream: Tokyo-listed CDN & video streaming vendor — live/VOD APIs, CMAF packaging and Japan-regional edge POPs.

when_to_use: Japanese CDN and video streaming with domestic edge PoPs
Live and VOD video delivery optimized for Japanese audiences
CMAF and HLS packaging for low-latency Japanese broadcast
Managed streaming platform for Japanese enterprise media
Regional CDN for Japan-first content delivery strategies

pros: Strong presence and POPs inside Japan
CMAF packaging and live/VOD APIs included
cons: Less modern developer tooling vs Mux
review.verdict: Reliable video CDN for the Japanese market, not a global option but a safe enterprise pick within Japan.
review.best_for: Japanese broadcasters and enterprises needing local video delivery compliance
review.not_for: Global streaming products or teams expecting English-first developer experience
